task_completion.description: Search for the patient Arthur Morgan in the OSCAR EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search interface showing 'Arthur' and 'Morgan' entered into the patient search fields, or search results displaying the patient 'Arthur Morgan'.

task_completion.description: Access the demographic or master record for Arthur Morgan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Master Demographic screen or patient profile for 'Arthur Morgan' is visible.

task_completion.description: Change the patient's status to Deceased (DE).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or status field for the patient is set to 'Deceased' or 'DE'.

task_completion.description: Enter yesterday's date into the Date of Death field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date field specifically for 'Date of Death' (or similar) is filled with a date corresponding to yesterday (relative to the system date visible in the OS taskbar).
A confirmation message indicating the demographic record was updated successfully, or the view returns to the patient summary showing the new 'Deceased' status and Date of Death.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR web interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to update the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser showing the OSCAR EMR interface, with no terminal windows executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to access the OSCAR EMR instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the local OSCAR URL (e.g., localhost:8080/oscar/...) and standard browser UI elements are present.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the success state in a text editor or HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the actual OSCAR EMR web application, not a text editor, IDE, or a locally modified static HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Arthur Morgan. Target Status Code: 'DE' (Deceased). OSCAR EMR URL: http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. Credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. The VLM should verify that the patient's status is set to Deceased/DE and the Date of Death field is populated with yesterday's date.
